reviews.text: Place is clean always quite and works are helpful
Great place
Very efficient and professional.
Messrs.  Hofgard and Ruffato took on and prevailed in an excess proceeds action involving unethical and malicious opposing counsel.  Mr.  Hofgard is highly ethical and skilled as a trial attorney.
Great service!

Matt Hofgard was incredibly helpful in giving advice to resolve a complex mortgage issue on an investment property I was interested in purchasing. He took time out of his schedule to discuss the laws surrounding the issue, options, and clear legal fees with me without asking for payment of the short consultation. I would absolutely go back to Ruffato & Hofgard with an issues surrounding my investments.

Very informative
Knowledgeable about various situations.
I will be going back.

A little miss communication with the current location (they have moved locations and online still shows old address) I unfortunately showed up to the old address, thankfully im an early person as i had to backtrack (should confirm address if scheduling a consultation) New building is definitely an uprgade, and everything was fast and to the point my attorney Barry Aylstock very knowledgeable and has been great thus far. Faith Law's name says I'm in the right hands... 🙏

I used Michael about four years ago w an ex-girlfriend break issue on a co-purchased home and Michael communicated well, got back to me in time and went up against hood Scottsdale attorney w fair success. Had better and had worse but to me he was young back then
great people.  Extremely great knowledge and experience.
Highly recommend these lawyers!!!
Michael has been awesome to work with, Professional and friendly, he cares and gets the job done.

Wow.  Loved the name so I called.  Lady answers the phone I ask, "how are you"... she says "how can I help you."  I said you can't.  Horrible communication /telephone and customer service skills.  Lady what has happened to you that you forgot the basic fundamental of humanity. When someone cares enough to ask how you are - ANSWER THEM! While I appreciate your need to control the conversation and maintain time management - if it comes at this cost YOUR INTERNAL INFRASTRUCTURE IS BROKEN and you can't be that good of an attorney.  YOU LOST A BLACK AND WHITE CASE AGAINST A LARGE COMPANY!  fools!

I was involved in a pretty bad car accident. My family and I called Richard Suzuki and he fought the insurance company and obtained a great settlement. They were always available and answered any questions I had. Couldn’t picked a better law firm to represent me!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Michael,
Thank you for trusting me and the entire Suzuki Law team. I’m very pleased with the outcome and wish you nothing but the best moving forward. Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you ever need anything.
Richard Suzuki

I have been through several probates and they atr horrible! A friend tragically passed away and Fath Law was amazing!!!!  First they respectfully said thier condolences and said we will help them through this.   2. We starting working with Nathalie and she worked with us with everything that we needed to do, there were several houses invovled, and was very meticulas on what needed to happen, information needed, etc.  She took a huge weight off our shoulders, all the time checking in. 3. when we needed other information she was dilligent on pointing us in the right direction.

I Would highly recommend Thomas Atkins! He’s professional and knowledgeable and very understanding. I felt very comfortable and at ease that he was handling my case. He communicated everything in a timely  manner. Natalie was great too! Thank you all again!

Inefficient. Poor communication.

reviews.text:
The consultation was quoted to be 60.00 1/2 hour was charged 80.00.
And really didn't answer the question.
Let karma take care of it.

The thought of hiring an attorney was intimidating. Knowing I would have to give him a lot of money upfront was not appealing at all. However, after meeting and talking with Jim Ferlmann I felt at ease. My intuition let me know he was a good man and a good attorney. There was something about his approach that gave me enough confidence to hire him and YES give him what was to me, a large retainer. Rather than bore you with the details, I never lost my confidence in him and YES I did win the case. His knowledge was excellent and he seemed to have expertise in the fine details of the law. I highly recommend Jim and am blessed that my prayers were answered and I was led me to this ecellent attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your thoughtful experience! We understand that the decision to hire an attorney can feel overwhelming, and we’re so glad Jim’s knowledge, professionalism, and approach gave you the confidence and peace of mind you needed. It’s wonderful to hear that your case was resolved successfully and that Jim was able to guide you through the process. Your recommendation and trust mean so much to us.

reviews.text: Made first appt for my 94 year old mom to re-edit my mom’s living trust. Who was visiting me fron California. She has a few real estate investments in AZ. The receptionist called the same day to cancel our appt. They asked to reschedule which we did for the following Friday at the surprise office - per receptionist request. Arrived at the surprise office for the 2nd scheduled appt. The receptionist gave us the wrong info. We called them to get the correct info n they said our appt was canceled again. No one called me to cancel. And of course this was the 2nd cancellation. You can’t rely on this office to keep appts.
Not a good law firm find someone who can listen to your case

Clark’s Paralegal Nathalie Florres  was extremely professional, polished and knowledgeable.  She always had great turn around time on any open issues or questions.  Thanks

In addition, I have the pleasure working with litigation attorney Bob Elliott.  Mix of southern charm with a tapered pit bull which is what i needed.

Sarah Harper, the Paralegal manager provided a jigh level of expertise, experience and genuinely very nice

Thanks to everyone.

R. Allen

reviews.text:
After scheduling an appointment 2 days ahead, they called day-of and rscheduled my appointment from 2:00 p.m. to 2:30 p.m. The lawyer I was to meet with was still not available at 2:35 p.m. They called at 2:40, but I told them I wouldn't be needing their services, I can't trust them to be professional.

Their response says they get held up with court proceedings and other time sensitive matters, and I understand that, but they did not reach out to me before my appointment. I had to call them 35 minutes after the appointment was supposed to start, because no one had reached out to me. They finally called (returned my call) 40 minutes after the appointment was supposed to start.

Unacceptable. They can call to reschedule if something important got wedged into the schedule. Sounds like they forgot.

If they pull this on me, they'll do it to anyone, including a judge.. I don't want that behavior representing me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jason, please accept our apology.  We do our best to meet with clients in a timely manner, but sometimes emergency court proceedings, extended settlement negotiations, or other meetings/consultations cause a delay.

reviews.text: Russell Wenk recently handled a divorce mediation for me.  He and his team were fast, gave great advice, and supported me during this transition.  Mediation is usually less expensive than a divorce trial.  If you and your partner agree on how assets should be divided, mediation is,the way to go.  You can’t go wrong with Lincoln & Wenk!

Katherine and Barbara were very helpful and attentive to our needs at an affordable price. Thank you ladies!

We then worked with Daniel to create a comprehensive estate plan. All very quick and affordable. Thanks to you too Daniel!

trustworthy, and a pleasure to work with.

reviews.text:

reviews.text: My (ex)wife was financially punishing me through my separation/divorce process, so I initially Google for family/divorce lawyer services based on rating. Lincoln & Wenk came on top of the list in my area, so I decided to make a consultation. Mr. Wenk immediately took charge and along his paralegal assisted me in lining up documentation to use in my defense. When the hearing came, Mr. Wenk used his technical expertise to stand up for me. In short time, the abusive demands from my (ex)wife declined drastically to the point she decided to settle the divorce down from $250,000 to $30,000. I appreciate Mr. Wenk and his staff for the peace of mind I now enjoy. They are knowledgeable and mindful people, highly recommended and would look again for their services if needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for taking the time to write a review, Gil.  We appreciate your business!

reviews.text: Erin & Tammy were able to help me through family court, it’s a nerve wracking process but they reassured me with questions I had through the entire process. They made sure all of the details they had were correct and were able to get additional information I didn’t think of to help our case. Erin was very professional in court, especially in comparison to the other attorney!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!

reviews.text: Very professional and Daniel was very helpful in answering all our questions.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Lori!

reviews.text:
My husband and I contacted Lincoln and Wenk to finalize our trust and will after the sudden death of my father this past summer.  Daniel Esparza was helpful, accurate, and sensitive to the topics we discussed.  It is NEVER easy to think about end-of-life choices, but he made the process seamless, and we appreciate his care and patience with us. reviews.text: Only if Google had no starts, that will be my selection. Awful lawfirm! Told them everything what I wanted for against my son father and they wrote down the opposite of what I said. It finally gor fixed before submitting the documents to court. It has been finalized for a few months now and my baby daddy isn't following the court orders. I reach out to this law firm again telling them the different occasions when my son father disobeying the court orders and to assist me what to do next and how much it will cost me. The worker said they can't help me and look else where. I ask for an explanation why and she said they have nothing else to say to me!!!! What an unprofessional firm they are!! reviews.text:
I’m not someone who usually leaves reviews, but I feel compelled to share my experience with LINCOLN & WENK.

Unfortunately, my experience was deeply disappointing. From the receptionist to the billing department to the attorneys themselves, the entire team treated me with rudeness and a complete lack of professionalism. I felt disrespected, mistreated, and, to be honest, discriminated against.
Their fees are outrageous for the quality of service they provide. There are many other attorneys who offer far better service at much more reasonable rates.
My case was straightforward  something that should have been simple for Gabriella Mayers to handle. However, she didn’t seem confident in managing it and brought in Roussell Wenk, whom I never hired. I retained one attorney, yet I was billed for two. This felt like a clear case of overcharging.
I don’t want to speculate too much, but I couldn’t help but notice suspicious behavior between Gabriella and Roussell. Their interactions in court raised questions  their body language, the way they spoke to each other  it felt unprofessional. More importantly, neither of them was prepared for my court appearance. I have no idea what they were doing the weekend before, but they certainly weren’t preparing for my case.

In the end, a paralegal from the opposing side outperformed both of them. It was embarrassing and unacceptable.

Overall, working with LINCOLN & WENK was a waste of my time, money, and trust. I would strongly advise others to look elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We will refrain from discussing the circumstances of your legal matter in a public forum and wish you the best going forward.

reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about this law office. All staff are warm and welcoming. Daniel did a great job, took his time and explained everything clearly regarding my estate plan. He is easy to talk to. His paralegal  Ellen was friendly and helpful and my situation called for some urgency and they expedited the process to fit my needs. I reccomend them highly.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you!

reviews.text: Would not recommend! Erin G. was unprofessional from the beginning. She was very condescending and I could tell she was not wanting to help. My spouse even noticed she was giving a standoffish vibe. I still gave her the benefit of the doubt. She actually was siding to the respondent during one of the conference hearings. When asking questions she made feel like I should already have known the answer as if I knew what to expect.  She even withdrew from my case and never gave a reason why. I had a gut feeling about her and I was right. I would never refer any clients to her. This attorney is very unprofessional and its unfortunate that I will have to seek another law firm to assist with upcoming hearing.
reviews.ownerResponse: We stand by the work we did on this matter and our decision to withdraw from it.  We will honor our attorney-client privilege obligation and not respond further. Thank you.

reviews.text: I cannot say enough about what a godsend this office was for me and my family. My father in law was diagnosed with dementia a couple years back and we have been struggling getting him moved from Colorado to be closer to us, maintain some independence for him in an apartment but in reality we were trying to juggle more than we could handle. He needed 24 hour care and supervision for his safety and we as a working family with 5 kids in the house still were not able to provide that. This office helped me make that possible. Marcie Maloy was amazing through the entire process and walked me through each step in getting him into the right program that would set him up for success. They also took care of the Power of Attorney paperwork and living will that he didn't have up until that point. He is now happy and thriving at a beautiful group home in north phoenix with the right care he was in need of. A huge thanks to Marcie and her team for all that they did for us!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing this, Beckie!  We're so glad that we were able to assist your family in completing the necessary steps to take good care of your father-in-law!

reviews.text:
After my car accident, I was overwhelmed and unsure what to expect, but my attorney Joel and his firm made the entire process smooth and stress-free. He was attentive, listened carefully to my concerns, and always kept me informed without me having to follow up.

Communication was excellent from start to finish, and everything moved much faster than I anticipated. Best of all,   a settlement that was higher than I expected was secured. I truly felt supported every step of the way and would absolutely recommend him to anyone in need of a reliable and effective attorney.
You won’t find many firms as responsive and down to earth as Farar and Lewis. They handle things the right way.
I’ve known the Farar and Lewis team for a long time, and they’re just solid human beings. Easy to talk to, thoughtful, and always willing to help.
Hardworking firm with strong values and a real commitment to people.
Joel and Justin are the real deal. Professional, kind, and always grounded.
Top notch reputation. Everyone I know speaks highly of Farar and Lewis.
Farar and Lewis are genuinely good people who run their firm with honesty and heart.
Helped my family member get back on track and get compensated. Thank you guys!
Top notch attorneys and really take the time to gather everything.  I would use them again but hopefully not needed :)

Everyone always asks.. well did you get a good lawyer?  Yes I did, this group is great.  Kayla, Sara and the others are fantastic and I highly suggest if you can use them, to do so.  They are 26 miles from my house and given to me by a friend that also used them.  The stress of any matter involving an attorney to represent you can take its toll.  They allowed me to do business as usual, take care of my daughter and leave the stress to them.

Working with Sara on the adoption of our daughter was nothing short of extraordinary. My husband has lovingly raised our daughter for the past 10 years, and this adoption was something we’ve dreamed about for a very long time. It was deeply emotional for our family, and Sara understood that from the very beginning.
From our first conversation, Sara showed not only deep knowledge of the legal process but also something even more important—compassion. She approached our case with urgency, but never made us feel rushed. She was patient, attentive, and always available to answer our questions or reassure us during moments of uncertainty.
When unexpected hiccups arose (as they do), Sara didn’t just deliver solutions—she delivered peace of mind. Her calm presence and clear communication helped us stay grounded and hopeful. She treated our case with the kind of care you’d expect from a close friend, not just an attorney.
Thanks to her, what once felt like a distant hope became a beautiful reality. Our family is now complete in the eyes of the law, and we will always be grateful for Sara’s role in making that happen.
If you are looking for a lawyer who brings both heart and expertise to the table, I cannot recommend Sara enough. She is a true advocate, and she made all the difference in one of the most important moments of our lives.
Didn’t file paperwork on time, lied to me and my family. Rude and not worth what they charge.

I had a truly positive experience working with Gina and her entire team. Everyone I interacted with was consistently kind, supportive, and professional. From the very beginning, I felt heard and understood, and their communication was excellent throughout the entire process.

Gina was especially wonderful to work with. She took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I was comfortable and informed every step of the way. She handled everything I needed promptly and with great care.

What stood out most was how the team really took the time to understand exactly what I needed and worked hard to help me achieve it. I always felt like I was in good hands, and I’m incredibly grateful for their support and dedication.

Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Hannah!!

reviews.text:
When I came in and met with Sarah I knew I was in the right office. From the receptionist down to the courtroom work that Sarah did for us was beyond amazing. She knew all of the little thing things that are needed when you have a judge asking questions. The outcome of our trial went exactly like we planed. Not only is she good at her knowledge of the law, but she cares for people. I would recommend this firm for any services they offer.
MIKE FISHER
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Mike!!!  We are so happy everything went so smoothly.

reviews.text:
The entire staff was amazing, Sara was extremely knowledgeable and professional and when it came to having to go to court I was so impressed with Sara, it was like watching the Yankees play ball with a minor league team. I was so relieved that I had Becker Zarling & Smith Law on my side. I have used them twice and I will definitely use them again.
Thank to everyone at Becker Zarling & Smith Law!
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate the kind words.  Great results!

reviews.text: Tried to win against me but lost because they tried to hard to get custody of a child who wasn't their clients. If you want someone to try this is your place.
reviews.ownerResponse: As the opposing party, your view on the case is obviously different and this statement is not accurate or based in law.

reviews.text: I was in a bind and needed a power of attorney on short notice. They were very accommodating and gave me what I needed very quickly. They will certainly be my first call from now on.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Tim.

reviews.text: Sara and her team are amazing! Very accommodating, professional, knowledgeable, encouraging, and overall a pleasure to work with. I was incredibly lost on where to begin with a guardianship case AND I live out of state- from my first phone call with setting up a consultation, I knew I found the best representation possible! Communication is top notch and I wish I could give more than 5 stars on this review! Thank you Sara and team for all of your work and encouragement!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you

reviews.text: Never thought I would ever need to hire an attorney to assist me in navigating through family situation I was dealing with for over 12 years. My silence and turning the cheek of the toxic relationship with a family member was trumpeted by Gina. Gina and her team stepped up when needed and the echo resonated. Thank you Gina and Team. I highly recommend if your ever in the need for assistance in her field of service, she is the person you want on your team. The experience was beyond the expectations.

I used thus law firm years ago to get joint custody of my boys. They were amazing, helped me step by step. The office staff was always positive and polite. Gina was amazing best family law attorney in Arizona.  I'm thankful for this team. I highly recommend this law firm.  Thank you for all you did for my family.

reviews.text:
Friendly professional staff
Gina is communicative and represents what is best for her clients.
Beautiful office with an amazing atmosphere, and attentive, patient, and caring legal team. Definitely one of the best in Arizona. Gina and her team took care of my grandma and myself for many years!

Gina was actually our second attorney.
The first attorney looked great on paper. The opposing attorney was a bully. It became frighteningly apparent after a few months that he was not willing to fight for us. We would have lost everything.
Finding Gina was a God-send. For the first time we felt like someone was listening to us and cared about the outcome-not just of a court case-but of our lives.
She was in our corner every step of the way. And isn't that what you want in an attorney?
Law suits are scary and. There is an order and language to them and a knowledgeable attorney is a must. I wish we had found Gina years ago! She and her entire staff are A+.

Gina Becker-Zarling represented me in a family matter with a passion for fairness for a just solution for both parties. You can trust Gina Becker-Zarling to deliver the highest of legal advise, while being mindful of fairness and toughness when required.

I want to thank Gina and her exceptional team at Becker-Zarling Law.  I’ve been a client of Gina’s since 2012 for my ongoing family law needs and she has literally been a life changing ally for me in my personal legal case.  When I first began my case with her I was truly blown away with the integrity, knowledge, dedication, experience, professionalism, and success Gina and her team provided.  They are thorough communicators so you’re always aware of the status and updates on your case. As each year passes I’m am even more amazed at the continued unparalleled level of service and care Gina and her staff give to my case.  Gina leads by example and is proof that one can be a powerful, effective, and strategic legal representative and yet maintain a reputation as a well respected and ethical member of the legal community and courts.  Values and qualities all clients would be grateful for.  So once again, thank you Gina and entire office team for being my trusted  ally throughout.  Blessings and be well.
Amazing service and experience. Gina and her team made a difficult situation much easier.  I plan on using Becker- Zarling in the future for any family law needs that arise.
This is my attorney I believe in her

I’m happy Gina service she’s a good lawyer and professional. I’m going to divorce process but the process divorce take longer than I was married. But I’m glad I found Gina she’s helping me with my emotional divorce process. And all her stuff very friendly specially to cendy thank you for all your advice I learned a lot.
GOOD FAMILY LAWYER
This place is amazing the ladies that work there are friendly kind and when your have questions they respond quick if your in need help with your case I really recommend this office
Defenitly got what i paid for. (results)
Gina is an excellent attorney. He office is compassionate and knows exactly how to use Arizona laws to best help their clients.
